question_text: Which of these forces would NOT be classified as a contact force?

options.label: A
options.text: A person pushing a shopping trolley

options.label: B
options.text: A magnet pulling an iron nail towards it

options.label: D
options.text: A tennis racket hitting a ball

explanation: Magnetic force is a non-contact force that can work across a distance without objects touching. All the other options involve direct contact between surfaces.
